prompt: A dynamic anime cyberpunk action illustration of a young female cyborg with bright pink twin-tail hair, suspended in a vast futuristic neon city shaft filled with glowing circuitry, holographic reflections, and dense sci-fi architecture. She is viewed in an extreme foreshortened perspective, lunging directly toward the camera with one oversized mechanical hand thrust forward, fingers spread and tipped with long glossy claws, while the other cybernetic arm is bent back in attack posture. She has a fierce focused expression, luminous green eyes, small glossy black-and-magenta horn-like head implants, and long flowing hair whipping outward in all directions. Her body is encased in a high-detail reflective chrome-and-magenta cybernetic exosuit with translucent chest plating, segmented armored shoulders, mechanical gauntlets, exposed joint details, armored thighs, and blade-like lower leg armor. Behind her are 2 large radiant energy wings made of pink crystalline electricity and particle streaks, exploding outward symmetrically. The environment is a vertical futuristic corridor or megacity canyon with layered glass panels, glowing signage, metallic frameworks, blue and cyan lights mixed with dominant hot pink illumination, countless spark-like particles, lens glow, and high-density detail. Use a dramatic low-angle composition, centered character, aggressive attack pose, glossy surfaces, intense specular highlights, saturated magenta and cyan palette, cinematic sci-fi atmosphere, ultra-detailed anime rendering, sharp linework, and a sense of speed, power, and overwhelming visual density.
